spatial_rules.primary_strategy: simple rectangular room sequence with efficient storage and clear circulation
spatial_rules.ventilation: use practical windows and compact lightwell when needed
spatial_rules.privacy: simple recessed entry and controlled street-facing openings
spatial_rules.lot_fit: works well for compact townhouses and apartments where storage, circulation, and maintenance matter more than decorative features
spatial_rules.section_idea: use a simple section through stair/storage/lightwell only when it clarifies the compact layout

opening_rules.door_style: flat panel or simple timber tone
opening_rules.window_style: clean rectangular windows with simple shading
opening_rules.default_opening_strategy: use fewer, well-proportioned openings that are easy to shade and maintain

default_rules.homeowner_question_policy: do not ask for technical dimensions by default; expose them as style assumptions

facade_intent: Quiet warm frontage with simple planes, restrained accents, and practical openings that support low maintenance.

facade_rules.massing: calm flat planes with one or two warm accents
facade_rules.screening: minimal vertical screen only where privacy or sun control is needed
facade_rules.rhythm: two or three calm vertical bays with one warm solid panel
facade_rules.opening_language: moderate rectangular openings, recessed or screened where privacy matters
facade_rules.shading: thin shadow ledges and simple reveals rather than decorative sun-breakers

facade_expression.rhythm: Calm asymmetric bays, one warm accent plane, and enough solid wall to feel private.
facade_expression.opening_language: Moderate rectangular windows; avoid a glass-heavy frontage unless the homeowner asks for it.
facade_expression.shading_language: Simple recessed reveals, slim ledges, and optional low-maintenance screen zones.
facade_expression.material_zone_language: Warm white/greige base with light wood or travertine-look accent panels.
facade_expression.client_explanation: Mặt tiền tối giản ấm ưu tiên mảng phẳng dễ bảo trì, ít vật liệu và cửa mở vừa phải để nhà gọn mà vẫn ấm.

material_assumptions: Palette is concept intent from the minimal_warm style profile and must be confirmed as real products later.
Warm wood/greige accents are visual direction only, not a final material specification.
Low-maintenance planting is shown as a homeowner-review cue, not a landscape specification.

drawing_rules.line_emphasis: storage, circulation, and main openings should be clear

drawing_notes: Mark built-in storage or service walls when they drive the plan.
Keep material notes restrained and practical.
Avoid adding decorative annotations that make the concept look busy.

large_glass.replacement: moderate windows with warm solid panels or a light privacy screen
large_glass.note: Suppress glass-heavy facade language while keeping daylight through smaller shaded openings.
large_glass.drawing_note: Giảm kính theo dislike: dùng cửa vừa phải, mảng đặc ấm và lam/màn nhẹ nếu cần riêng tư.

cold_dark_finishes.replacement: warm neutral base, matte finishes, and lighter timber/tile accents
cold_dark_finishes.note: Suppress cold or glossy dark finish language in favor of warmer matte concept notes.
cold_dark_finishes.drawing_note: Giảm cảm giác lạnh/tối theo dislike: ưu tiên nền sáng ấm và điểm nhấn mờ.

warm_wood_panel.material_note: Map homeowner-provided descriptors to light wood/greige concept accents.
warm_wood_panel.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: warm panel/storage language is shown as concept intent, not measured from an image.

calm_storage_wall.material_note: Use descriptors to reinforce tidy storage walls and calmer solid facade bays.
calm_storage_wall.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: quiet solid bays support low-clutter minimal warm expression.

validation_rules: storage intent should appear for apartment or compact townhouse scenarios

explanation_templates.style_summary: Hướng tối giản ấm phù hợp khi gia đình muốn không gian gọn, dễ chăm sóc và vẫn có cảm giác ấm.
explanation_templates.confirmation: Em đang nghiêng về hướng tối giản ấm: ít chi tiết, vật liệu sáng ấm và ưu tiên lưu trữ gọn gàng.
